test.name: Verify User Login

Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@class='form-control']' by value teacher.

test.doc: This test case will verify the login functionality of the application
